dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3816 IS: Repair Abuses of MSP Payments (RAMP) Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Scott of South Carolina (for himself and Ms. Hassan) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to permit a private cause of action for damages in the case of a group health plan which fails to provide for primary payment or appropriate reimbursement.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Repair Abuses of MSP Payments (RAMP) Act.

section.header: Private cause of action for damages in the case of a group health plan which fails to provide for primary payment or appropriate reimbursement
section.text: Section 1862(b)(3)(A) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395y(b)(3)(A)) is amended by striking primary plan and inserting group health plan (as defined in paragraph (1)(A)(v)).
